news.title:
Nifty Metal rose 1%, driven by Hindalco, JSW Steel, Tata Steel gains amid strong fundamentals.
Hindalco clarified limited impact from supply disruption; JSW Steel advanced coking coal project in Mozambique.
news.summary:

news.title: Hindalco refutes claims about halting extrusion operations, ensuring overall operations are largely unaffected.

news.title:
Hindalco faces potential disruption in aluminium extrusion business due to gas supply issues.
The company informed exchanges but operations continue; it's a routine business update.
news.summary:

news.title:
MSMEs face operational challenges due to gas supply disruptions, impacting productivity.
They seek a 6-month debt moratorium and fresh loans to fulfill pending orders.

news.title:
India's new QCO mandates BIS compliance for aluminium products.
This affects domestic and overseas firms in engineering, packaging, and more.

news.title:
Hindalco halts extruded aluminium sales as Iran war disrupts supply chain.
Conflict impacts Indian industry gas supplies via Strait of Hormuz.

news.title:
Novelis Inc., Hindalco's subsidiary, entered a Material Definitive Agreement involving a $225M municipal bond offering.
Hindalco disclosed this under SEBI Regulation 30; details are on Hindalco and Novelis websites.

news.title:
Nalco, Hindalco, Vedanta shares may react as Qatalum halts aluminium production, raising supply concerns.

news.title:
Nifty dropped 312 points, rebounding 250 points after hitting 24,600 support zone but closed below 25,000 due to geopolitical concerns.
Bharat Electronics, Hindalco gained; InterGlobe Aviation, L&T dragged indices. Bank Nifty fell 1.14%, critical support at 59,300.
news.summary:
Nifty dropped 312 points, rebounding 250 points after hitting 24,600 support zone but closed below 25,000 due to geopolitical concerns.
Bharat Electronics, Hindalco gained; InterGlobe Aviation, L&T dragged indices. Bank Nifty fell 1.14%, critical support at 59,300.

news.title:
NSE, BSE closed for Holi; trading resumes March 4, 2026.
Sensex fell 1.3%, Nifty 1.2% amid global tensions; BEL, Hindalco gained.
news.summary:
NSE, BSE closed for Holi; trading resumes March 4, 2026.

news.title:
Jio Financial infused Rs 2,000 crore into Jio Credit for growth; HCLTech signed an MoU with IIT Kanpur for GCC solutions.
Hindalco's Aluchem deal faces US regulatory delay; NTPC, GMDC signed MoUs for coal and lignite resource utilization.
news.summary:

news.title:

news.title:
Novelis, Hindalco's subsidiary, entered a deal with AV Minerals to sell 13.3M shares.
The transaction is priced at ₹150/share, valued at ₹2B; Novelis filed Form 8-K with US SEC.
news.summary:
Novelis, Hindalco's subsidiary, entered a deal with AV Minerals to sell 13.3M shares.
The transaction is priced at ₹150/share, valued at ₹2B; Novelis filed Form 8-K with US SEC.

news.title:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.
news.summary:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.
